scenario: Login successfully with standard user
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce"
And I click the Login button
Then I should be redirected to the inventory page
And the product list should be visible

scenario: Login fails for locked out user
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter username "locked_out_user" and password "secret_sauce"
And I click the Login button
Then an error message "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out." should appear

scenario: Login with empty username shows error
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I leave the username field empty
And I enter password "secret_sauce"
And I click the Login button
Then an error message "Epic sadface: Username is required" should appear

scenario: Login with empty password shows error
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter username "standard_user"
And I leave the password field empty
And I click the Login button
Then an error message "Epic sadface: Password is required" should appear

scenario: Login with invalid credentials shows error
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter username "invalid_user" and password "wrong_pass"
And I click the Login button
Then an error message "Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service" should appear

scenario: Error message clears when X button is clicked
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I submit the form with empty credentials
Then an error message should appear
When I click the X button on the error message
Then the error message should disappear

scenario: Login with performance glitch user succeeds (slow)
description:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter username "performance_glitch_user" and password "secret_sauce"
And I click the Login button
Then I should eventually be redirected to the inventory page (may take up to 10s)

scenario: Logout successfully returns to login page
description:
Given I am logged in as "standard_user"
When I open the burger menu
And I click the Logout button
Then I should be redirected to the login page
And the Login button should be visible

scenario: Inventory page displays 6 products
description:
Given I am logged in as "standard_user"
When I am on the inventory page
Then I should see exactly 6 product items

scenario: Sort products A to Z
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I select sort option "Name (A to Z)"
Then the product names should be sorted in ascending alphabetical order

scenario: Sort products Z to A
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I select sort option "Name (Z to A)"
Then the product names should be sorted in descending alphabetical order

scenario: Sort products by price low to high
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I select sort option "Price (low to high)"
Then the product prices should be sorted in ascending order

scenario: Sort products by price high to low
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I select sort option "Price (high to low)"
Then the product prices should be sorted in descending order

scenario: Add item to cart shows badge count
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I click "Add to cart" on "Sauce Labs Backpack"
Then the cart icon badge should show "1"

scenario: Add multiple items to cart updates badge
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I add "Sauce Labs Backpack" and "Sauce Labs Bike Light" to cart
Then the cart icon badge should show "2"

scenario: Remove item from inventory page hides badge
description:
Given I have added "Sauce Labs Backpack" to the cart
When I click "Remove" on the same product
Then the cart icon badge should not be visible

scenario: Click product name navigates to detail page
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I click on the name "Sauce Labs Backpack"
Then I should be navigated to the product detail page
And the URL should contain "inventory-item.html"

scenario: Click cart icon navigates to cart page
description:
Given I am on the inventory page
When I click the cart icon
Then I should be navigated to the cart page
And the URL should contain "cart.html"

scenario: Cart page displays added items correctly
description:
Given I have added "Sauce Labs Backpack" to the cart
When I navigate to the cart page
Then I should see "Sauce Labs Backpack" listed in the cart
And the item name, description, and price should be correct

scenario: Remove item from cart page
description:
Given I have "Sauce Labs Backpack" in the cart
When I click "Remove" on the cart page
Then the item should be removed from the cart
And the cart badge should not be visible

scenario: Continue Shopping button returns to inventory
description:
Given I am on the cart page
When I click "Continue Shopping"
Then I should be returned to the inventory page

scenario: Checkout button navigates to checkout step 1
description:
Given I have at least one item in the cart
When I click "Checkout"
Then I should be navigated to the checkout information page
And the URL should contain "checkout-step-one.html"

scenario: Empty cart shows no items
description:
Given I am logged in as "standard_user" and have not added any items
When I navigate to the cart page
Then the cart should be empty with no items listed

scenario: Cart persists after page reload
description:
Given I have added "Sauce Labs Backpack" to the cart
When I reload the page
Then the cart badge should still show "1"
And the item should still be in the cart

scenario: Proceed to step 2 with valid info
description:
Given I am on checkout step 1
When I enter First Name "John", Last Name "Doe", Zip "10001"
And I click "Continue"
Then I should be redirected to checkout step 2
And the URL should contain "checkout-step-two.html"

scenario: Checkout fails with empty first name
description:
Given I am on checkout step 1
When I leave First Name empty and fill Last Name and Zip
And I click "Continue"
Then an error "Error: First Name is required" should appear

scenario: Checkout fails with empty last name
description:
Given I am on checkout step 1
When I fill First Name, leave Last Name empty, fill Zip
And I click "Continue"
Then an error "Error: Last Name is required" should appear

scenario: Checkout fails with empty zip code
description:
Given I am on checkout step 1
When I fill First Name and Last Name, leave Zip empty
And I click "Continue"
Then an error "Error: Postal Code is required" should appear

scenario: Cancel on step 1 returns to cart
description:
Given I am on checkout step 1
When I click "Cancel"
Then I should be returned to the cart page

scenario: Cancel on step 2 returns to inventory
description:
Given I am on checkout step 2 (order overview)
When I click "Cancel"
Then I should be returned to the inventory page

scenario: Order total is correctly calculated on step 2
description:
Given I have added items totalling a known price
When I reach checkout step 2
Then the item total and grand total should be correctly calculated and displayed

scenario: Back Home button on confirmation returns to inventory
description:
Given I have completed a checkout and see the confirmation page
When I click "Back Home"
Then I should be returned to the inventory page
And the cart badge should not be visible

scenario: Order summary shows all price components on step 2
description:
Given I am on checkout step 2
When I view the order overview
Then I should see the item list, subtotal, tax, and total price all visible

scenario: Complete full checkout flow - finish button
description:
Given I am on checkout step 2 with valid items
When I click "Finish"
Then I should see the order confirmation screen

scenario: Order confirmation shows success message
description:
Given I have completed the checkout flow
When I see the confirmation page
Then a success header and confirmation text should be visible

scenario: Burger menu opens and closes
description:
Given I am logged in and on any page
When I click the burger menu icon
Then the side menu should open with options: All Items, About, Logout, Reset App State
When I click X to close
Then the menu should close

scenario: Reset App State clears cart
description:
Given I have items in my cart
When I open the burger menu and click "Reset App State"
Then the cart badge should disappear
And all "Add to cart" buttons should be reset

scenario: All Items menu link returns to inventory
description:
Given I am on a page other than inventory
When I open the burger menu and click "All Items"
Then I should be navigated back to the inventory page

scenario: problem_user broken images / form bugs (spec gap - not fully specified)
description:
Given I am logged in as "problem_user"
When I browse the inventory and checkout
Then broken images and form bugs are expected but exact acceptance criteria are NOT defined in the spec

scenario: error_user action-specific error behaviours (spec gap)
description:
Given I am logged in as "error_user"
When I perform add-to-cart / checkout actions
Then specific error behaviours occur but are NOT defined in the spec

scenario: visual_user visual differences need screenshot comparison (Chromatic)
description:
Given I am logged in as "visual_user"
When I view the inventory page
Then visual differences require a screenshot/visual regression check (Chromatic), not a functional assertion
